metadata.description: Deep video and image work for coding agents: analyze, describe, search, caption, clip, detect faces, and publish via the tinycloud CLI.

plugins.name: tinycloud
plugins.description: Video and image understanding and editing via the tinycloud CLI (Cloudglue): watch/see/extract/search/ask/face over videos and images, captions, clips, collections, plus one-command workflows for sales coaching, blog posts, ad analysis, meeting breakdowns, and YouTube publishing.
